primary.role: Brand primary, used in CTAs, toggles, active nav, and accent text
primary.source: Gradient button end stop, active sidebar items, heading accents (42 occurrences)

secondary.role: Secondary text, muted labels, table headers, borders
secondary.source: Table column headers (COMPANIES, MEMBERS), rectangles (116 occurrences)

success.role: Success states, positive percentage indicators, completion badges
success.source: Progress bars, percentage text like '55%' (23 occurrences)

warning.source: Warning gradient start stop, alert elements

error.role: Error states, destructive actions, negative indicators

info.role: Info states, informational badges, secondary accents

body.source: Sidebar nav items, body copy (247 occurrences)

gradient-primary.usage: Primary buttons, accent elements, active indicators

gradient-info.usage: Info cards, stat boxes, informational elements

shadowStyle.notes: Soft UI uses subtle, diffused shadows for floating card appearance. Two-layer shadows create depth without harsh edges.

gradientMatching.notes: All semantic gradients use 135deg consistently. Non-135 gradients are logo/icon-specific, not part of the design system.

surfaces.notes: Sidebar uses semi-transparent white with backdrop blur. Cards are solid white with soft shadows.

typography.notes: Uses clean sans-serif typography. Dark headings (#252f40 or #141414), body text (#67748e), muted labels (#8392ab). Primary color (#cb0c9f) used for accent text.

indicators: Multi-layer soft shadows on all cards (floating appearance)
135deg gradient angle on all semantic gradient buttons
Magenta primary (#cb0c9f) used in toggles, accents, and active states
Light gray (#f8f9fa) page background with white card surfaces
Consistent gradient system: primary, info, success, warning, error, dark, secondary, light
